trades.reasoning: GLXY has dropped out of the momentum screener entirely — no bullish signals — and crypto-adjacent names face headwinds in a neutral, low-conviction market day; rotating proceeds into a scored candidate.

Score 95 with RSI 68.2 in the momentum sweet spot, MACD crossover confirmed, histogram rising, and price extended above SMA-20 — construction/infrastructure names tend to hold well in neutral macro environments.

decisions.briefing: Market is quiet today with the S&P up half a percent — no strong directional signal. Cash is nearly depleted at $226, so the only way to add a high-conviction position is to rotate out of a holder that has lost screener momentum. GLXY has fallen completely off the board with no technical signals, making it the cleanest candidate to exit and redeploy into ROAD, which sits at score 95 with a full set of bullish confirmations.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher today with the S&P 500 gaining 0.5% and the NASDAQ up 0.3%, suggesting a broadly risk-neutral tone with no single catalyst driving outsized moves. Sector rotation appeared orderly, with construction and infrastructure names showing relative strength while crypto-linked equities lagged. Without a clear macro catalyst, intraday price action reflected positioning adjustments rather than fresh directional conviction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日溫和上揚，標普500指數上漲0.5%，納斯達克指數上漲0.3%，整體市場情緒偏向中性，未見單一明確催化劑帶動大幅行情。盤面顯示，建設及基礎設施相關股份表現相對強勁，而加密貨幣相關股票則相對落後。在缺乏重大宏觀訊號的情況下，今日盤中走勢主要反映資金調倉，而非新的方向性押注。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation means selling positions that have lost their price momentum and redeploying that capital into stocks currently showing strong, confirmed upward momentum. The logic is that stocks already moving up — with MACD crossovers and RSI in the 55–70 zone — are more likely to keep moving up in the near term than ones that have stalled. This is why we exit GLXY (no screener signal) and enter ROAD (score 95 with full confirmation).
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是指賣出已失去價格動能的持倉，並將資金重新部署至目前具備強勁確認性上升動能的股票。其邏輯在於，已處於上升軌道、MACD呈現黃金交叉且RSI介於55至70之間的股票，短期內繼續上行的機率較高，遠優於動能已消退的持股。這正是今日出售GLXY（無技術訊號）、轉入ROAD（評分95分，訊號全面確認）的決策依據。
